title: National Grid DSO Roadmap aims to accelerate flexible low-carbon energy system
snippet:
National Grid roadmap supports cleaner, smarter and more flexible energy networks

The post National Grid DSO Roadmap aims to accelerate flexible low-carbon energ
ai_summary: National Grid's DSO roadmap may affect how tem interacts with distribution networks, flexibility markets, and DNO charges—areas central to I&C customer value propositions. This signals regulatory momentum toward more flexible, decentralized energy systems that could create opportunities for flexible supply and trading strategies.
ai_reasoning: DSO evolution directly touches tem's operating environment (DNO charges, balancing, flex markets) and could open new customer offerings. Worth reviewing for strategic implications, though not an immediate action item. Background reading on regulatory trends shaping the market.
